author: anon-581fd578
content: Plan: Fix submit_frame glyph processing to (1) use actual glyph_id and font_hash from PositionedGlyph data stored in RenderCommands, (2) call CosmicTextEngine::rasterize_glyph() to get actual GlyphBitmap, (3) upload real bitmap to atlas. Also fixing #24 (cache key) simultaneously since they're in the same code path. The challenge is that GlyphInstance doesn't carry glyph_id/font_hash — these are lost during batch building. Need to either store them in GlyphInstance or maintain a parallel vec.
